task_completion.description: ProjectLibre application is open displaying a project timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre GUI is visible on the screen with a project loaded (Gantt chart and task spreadsheet visible).

task_completion.description: The 'Total Slack' column is added and visible in the ProjectLibre task table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left-hand spreadsheet view of ProjectLibre, there is a column header explicitly named 'Total Slack' showing slack values for the tasks.

task_completion.description: The agent creates or opens the required report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal is open showing the file path '/home/ga/Projects/critical_path_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the task data in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains lines formatted exactly as 'Task Name | Duration | Total Slack | Critical' (where Critical is YES or NO) for the first 16 tasks.

task_completion.description: The report includes a summary line for Critical Path Tasks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the bottom of the text file, there is a summary line explicitly listing the 'Critical Path Tasks'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ProjectLibre GUI to extract data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating ProjectLibre, inserting columns, or viewing tasks, rather than just using a Python script or terminal command to parse the XML file.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the actual data present in the environment rather than hallucinating expected data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task names in the text report match the actual tasks visible in the ProjectLibre window (which will likely be 'Commercial Construction' tasks due to an environment bug), rather than hallucinated 'Enterprise Software Development' tasks.

integrity.description: The agent did not blindly generate a pre-computed expected answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen manually typing or copying data from the ProjectLibre window into the text editor, reflecting the actual state of the opened project.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be saved to '/home/ga/Projects/critical_path_report.txt'. The project file opened is '/home/ga/Projects/samples/sample_project.xml'. CRITICAL NOTE: Due to an environment setup bug, the loaded project is actually a 'Commercial Construction' template with 146 tasks, NOT the expected 'Enterprise Software Development Project' with 16 tasks. The agent should be evaluated on its ability to process the first 16 tasks of the ACTUALLY loaded project using the requested format, rather than being penalized for the environment's incorrect project data.
